title: Offensive security with a developer's discipline.
summary: I approach security work like engineering work: map the system, understand the assumptions, break the right things, then leave it stronger than I found it.

My background spans penetration testing, systems work, and web development, which lets me move comfortably between reconnaissance, exploitation, root-cause analysis, and pragmatic remediation guidance.
principles: Real-world attack paths over checkbox testing
Clear reporting that defenders can act on
Automation where it saves analysts time
